[Central Baltic] LATVIAN NAV WARN 018/26
270645 UTC JUN
LATVIAN NAV WARN 018/26.

CENTRAL BALTIC. LIEPAJA NORTHWARDS.
FIRING EXERCISE IN PROGRESS ON JUN 29 0600-0900 UTC IN
M2 AREA WITH A RADIUS OF 8 NM FROM PSN 56-42.0N 020-52.0E.
AREA CLOSED FOR NAVIGATION DURING EXERCISE.
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
INFORMATION ON RESTRICTIONS ON VHF CH 16.
CANCEL THIS MSG ON 290900 UTC JUN.
